dialogues.cn: 坦格利安王朝的第一个世纪
dialogues.en: As the first century of the Targaryen dynasty

dialogues.cn: 已近尾声
dialogues.en: came to a close

dialogues.cn: 人瑞王杰赫里斯一世的身体状况每况愈下
dialogues.en: the health of the Old King, Jaehaerys, was failing.

dialogues.cn: 那段岁月里 坦格利安家族轭下尚有十条成年巨龙
dialogues.en: In those days, House Targaryen stood at the height of its strength

dialogues.cn: 家族势力如日中天
dialogues.en: with ten adult dragons under its yoke.

dialogues.cn: 世间无人可与之抗衡
dialogues.en: No power in the world could stand against it.

dialogues.cn: 杰赫里斯国王的统治近六十年
dialogues.en: King Jaehaerys reigned over nearly 60 years

dialogues.cn: 王国和平而繁荣
dialogues.en: of peace and prosperity

dialogues.cn: 未曾想悲剧夺走了他的长子和次子的性命
dialogues.en: but tragedy had claimed both his sons

dialogues.cn: 使得继承人成了疑问
dialogues.en: leaving his succession in doubt.

dialogues.cn: 于是在征服101年
dialogues.en: So, in the year 101

dialogues.cn: 人瑞王召开大议会来选定继承人
dialogues.en: the Old King called a Great Council to choose an heir.

dialogues.cn: 上千领主赶赴赫伦堡
dialogues.en: Over a thousand lords made the journey to Harrenhal.

dialogues.cn: 十四位继承人选参与听证
dialogues.en: Fourteen succession claims were heard

dialogues.cn: 但真正的竞争者只有两位
dialogues.en: but only two were truly considered.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮丝·坦格利安公主 国王最年长的后裔
dialogues.en: Princess Rhaenys Targaryen, the King's eldest descendant

dialogues.cn: 和她的堂弟 韦赛里斯·坦格利安王子
dialogues.en: and her younger cousin, Prince Viserys Targaryen

dialogues.cn: 国王最年长的男性后裔
dialogues.en: the King's eldest male descendant.

dialogues.cn: 七大王国所有大小领主
dialogues.en: It is declared by all lords paramount

dialogues.cn: 和下属封臣共同宣布
dialogues.en: and lords vassal of the Seven Kingdoms

dialogues.cn: 韦赛里斯·坦格利安王子获封龙石岛亲王！
dialogues.en: that Prince Viserys Targaryen be made Prince of Dragonstone!

dialogues.cn: 雷妮丝身为女人 无缘继承铁王座
dialogues.en: Rhaenys, a woman, would not inherit the Iron Throne.

dialogues.cn: 领主们选择了韦赛里斯
dialogues.en: The lords instead chose Viserys

dialogues.cn: 我的父亲
dialogues.en: my father.

dialogues.cn: 杰赫里斯召开大议会
dialogues.en: Jaehaerys called the Great Council

dialogues.cn: 避免了因继承权而掀起战争
dialogues.en: to prevent a war being fought over his succession.

dialogues.cn: 只因他知晓那个冷酷的真相
dialogues.en: For he knew the cold truth.

dialogues.cn: 能摧毁龙王家族的
dialogues.en: The only thing that could tear down the House of the Dragon

dialogues.cn: 只有它自己
dialogues.en: was itself.

dialogues.cn: 听话 叙拉克斯！
dialogues.en: Dohaerās, Syrax!

dialogues.cn: 等等
dialogues.en: Umbās.

dialogues.cn: 乖！
dialogues.en: Rȳbās!

dialogues.cn: 欢迎回来 公主 相信您骑得很过瘾
dialogues.en: Welcome back, Princess. I trust your ride was pleasant.

dialogues.cn: 别故作轻松了 爵士
dialogues.en: Try not to look too relieved, ser.

dialogues.cn: 我是真的轻松
dialogues.en: I am relieved.

dialogues.cn: 每次那只金色巨兽带您安然无恙地回来
dialogues.en: Every time that golden beast brings you back unspoiled

dialogues.cn: 否则我的脑袋就得被插上尖桩。
dialogues.en: it saves my head from a spike.

dialogues.cn: 叙拉克斯长得很快
dialogues.en: Syrax is growing quickly.

dialogues.cn: 她很快就和科拉克休一样大了
dialogues.en: She'll soon be as large as Caraxes.

dialogues.cn: 大到可以放上双人龙鞍
dialogues.en: That's almost large enough to saddle two.

dialogues.cn: 我确信我在一旁当个观众就很满足了 谢谢
dialogues.en: I believe I'm quite content as a spectator, thank you.

dialogues.cn: 听话
dialogues.en: Dohaerās.

dialogues.cn: 往前！
dialogues.en: Naejot!

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 你知道我现在这个情况下
dialogues.en: You know I don't like you to go flying

dialogues.cn: 不喜欢你去骑龙
dialogues.en: while I'm in this condition.

dialogues.cn: 你在任何情况下都不喜欢我骑龙
dialogues.en: You don't like me to go flying while you're in any condition.

dialogues.cn: - 王后陛下 - 早 阿莉森
dialogues.en: - Your Grace. - Good morrow, Alicent.

dialogues.cn: 你睡了吗？
dialogues.en: Did you sleep?

dialogues.cn: - 睡了 - 睡了多久？
dialogues.en: - I slept. - How long?

dialogues.cn: 我不需要你来当老妈 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: I don't need mothering, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 但你周围这些服侍的人
dialogues.en: Well, here you are, surrounded by attendants

dialogues.cn: 都只关心你肚子里的宝宝
dialogues.en: all focused on the babe.

dialogues.cn: 总得有人关心你
dialogues.en: Someone has to attend to you.

dialogues.cn: 很快你也会躺在这张床上 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: You will lie in this bed soon enough, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 这种煎熬就是我们服务王国的方式
dialogues.en: This discomfort is how we serve the realm.

dialogues.cn: 我宁愿身为骑士驰骋疆场 去赢得荣誉
dialogues.en: I'd rather serve as a knight and ride to battle and glory.

dialogues.cn: 我们的子宫属于王室 你和我都是
dialogues.en: We have royal wombs, you and I.

dialogues.cn: 产床就是我们的战场
dialogues.en: The childbed is our battlefield.

dialogues.cn: 我们必须学会咬牙面对
dialogues.en: We must learn to face it with a stiff lip.

dialogues.cn: 现在去洗个澡
dialogues.en: Now take a bath.

dialogues.cn: 你臭得像条龙
dialogues.en: You stink of dragon.

dialogues.cn: 于是我对他说 我相信你
dialogues.en: So, I said to him, "Well, I believe

dialogues.cn: 应该看看另一端
dialogues.en: you might be looking up the wrong end."

dialogues.cn: 大人们
dialogues.en: My lords.

dialogues.cn: 自由贸易城邦的联盟正在壮大
dialogues.en: The growing alliance among the Free Cities

dialogues.cn: 开始自称三女儿王国
dialogues.en: has taken to styling itself the Triarchy.

dialogues.cn: 他们在血石岛聚集
dialogues.en: They have massed on Bloodstone

dialogues.cn: 目前正在驱除盘踞在石阶列岛
dialogues.en: and are presently ridding the Stepstones

dialogues.cn: 的那些海盗
dialogues.en: of its pirate infestation.

dialogues.cn: 听起来倒像是个好消息 科利斯大人
dialogues.en: Well, that sounds suspiciously like good news, Lord Corlys.

dialogues.cn: 有个叫克拉哈斯·达哈尔的家伙
dialogues.en: A man called Craghas Drahar

dialogues.cn: 自称三女儿王国的海军上将亲王
dialogues.en: has styled himself the prince-admiral of this Triarchy.

dialogues.cn: 别人叫他螃蟹喂食者
dialogues.en: They call him the Crabfeeder

dialogues.cn: 缘于他颇有创意的处死敌人的方式
dialogues.en: due to his inventive methods of punishing his enemies.

dialogues.cn: 难道我们要为海盗们哀悼吗？
dialogues.en: And are we meant to weep for dead pirates?

dialogues.cn: - 不 陛下 - 雷妮拉 你迟到了
dialogues.en: - No, Your Grace. - Rhaenyra, you're late.

dialogues.cn: 国王的侍酒可不能迟到
dialogues.en: The King's cupbearer must not be late.

dialogues.cn: - 大人们都渴了 - 我去看望母亲了
dialogues.en: - Leaves people wanting for cups. - I was visiting Mother.

dialogues.cn: 骑龙去的？
dialogues.en: On dragonback?

dialogues.cn: 陛下 戴蒙王子一直敦促国库
dialogues.en: Hey, Your Grace, at Prince Daemon's urging

dialogues.cn: 拨巨款给他的都城守备队
dialogues.en: the crown has invested significant capital

dialogues.cn: 以加强训练和升级装备
dialogues.en: in the re-training and re-equipping of his City Watch.

dialogues.cn: 我认为您也应该敦促您弟弟出席御前会议
dialogues.en: I thought you might urge your brother to fill his seat on the council

dialogues.cn: 作为都城守备队队长
dialogues.en: and provide an assessment of his progress

dialogues.cn: 向我们汇报工作进度
dialogues.en: as commander of the Watch.

dialogues.cn: 你不觉得戴蒙现在沉迷于工作
dialogues.en: Do you think Daemon is distracted by his present tasks?

dialogues.cn: 既能释放精力 又无暇他顾也不错吗？
dialogues.en: And that his thoughts and energies are occupied?

dialogues.cn: 希望如此 毕竟我们付出了不少成本
dialogues.en: Well, one would hope so, considering the associated costs.

dialogues.cn: 那就当你花的钱是笔划算的投资吧 毕斯柏里大人
dialogues.en: Then let us all consider your gold well-invested, Lord Beesbury.

dialogues.cn: 我认为您不能再纵容三女儿王国
dialogues.en: I would urge that you not allow this Triarchy much latitude

dialogues.cn: 在石阶列岛为所欲为了 陛下
dialogues.en: in the Stepstones, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 一旦航道受阻 会让我们的港口难以为继
dialogues.en: If those shipping lanes should fall, it will beggar our ports.

dialogues.cn: 国王已经听到你的谏言了 科利斯大人
dialogues.en: The crown has heard your report, Lord Corlys

dialogues.cn: 会认真考虑的
dialogues.en: and takes it under advisement.

dialogues.cn: 我们来谈谈王储比武大会吧 陛下
dialogues.en: Shall we discuss the Heir's Tournament, Your Grace?

dialogues.cn: 我十分乐意
dialogues.en: I would be delighted.

dialogues.cn: 学士们推算的预产期准吗，梅罗斯？
dialogues.en: Will the maesters' name day prediction hold, Mellos?

dialogues.cn: 您要明白这毕竟只是预测 陛下
dialogues.en: You must understand that these things are mere estimations, my King

dialogues.cn: 但我们在月表上呕心沥血
dialogues.en: but we have all been poring over the moon charts

dialogues.cn: 相信我们的预测已经尽可能精确
dialogues.en: and we feel that our forecast is as accurate as it can be.

dialogues.cn: 比武大会的开销巨大
dialogues.en: The cost of the tournament is not negligible.

dialogues.cn: 或许我们可以推迟至孩子出生后再开始？
dialogues.en: Perhaps we might delay until the child is in hand?

dialogues.cn: 大多数领主和骑士
dialogues.en: Most of the lords and knights

dialogues.cn: 都已经在赶往君临的路上
dialogues.en: are certainly on their way to King's Landing already.

dialogues.cn: - 现在让他们回去…… - 比武大会将持续
dialogues.en: - To turn them back now... - The tourney will take

dialogues.cn: 大半个星期
dialogues.en: the better part of a week.

dialogues.cn: 在比武大会结束前  我儿子便出生了
dialogues.en: Before the games are over, my son will be born

dialogues.cn: 整个国家将为之庆祝
dialogues.en: and the whole realm will celebrate.

dialogues.cn: 我们还无法预测孩子的性别
dialogues.en: We have no way of predicting the sex of the child.

dialogues.cn: 当然 没有学士会在缺乏依据的情况下
dialogues.en: Of course, no maester's capable of rendering an opinion

dialogues.cn: 做出判断 是吧？
dialogues.en: free of conditions, are they now?

dialogues.cn: 王后肚子里怀的是男孩
dialogues.en: There's a boy in the Queen's belly.

dialogues.cn: 我知道
dialogues.en: I know it.

dialogues.cn: 而我的继承人很快就会
dialogues.en: And my heir will soon put all of this

dialogues.cn: 亲自平息这一切糟心事
dialogues.en: damnable hand-wringing to rest himself.

dialogues.cn: 天一亮他就穿过了红堡大门
dialogues.en: He passed through the Red Keep's gates at first light.

dialogues.cn: 我父亲知道他来了吗？
dialogues.en: Does my father know he's here?

dialogues.cn: - 不知道 - 好的
dialogues.en: - No. - Good.

dialogues.cn: 诸神慈悲
dialogues.en: Gods be good.

dialogues.cn: 没事的 爵士
dialogues.en: It's all right, ser.

dialogues.cn: 我带了个礼物给你
dialogues.en: I bought you something.

dialogues.cn: 你知道这是什么吗？
dialogues.en: Do you know what it is?

dialogues.cn: 瓦雷利亚钢
dialogues.en: It's Valyrian steel.

dialogues.cn: 和黑暗姐妹一样
dialogues.en: Like Dark Sister.

dialogues.cn: 转过身去
dialogues.en: Turn around.

dialogues.cn: 现在
dialogues.en: Now

dialogues.cn: 你和我都拥有了我们祖先的一小块物品
dialogues.en: you and I both own a small piece of our ancestry.

dialogues.cn: - 你看书了吗？ -  我当然看了
dialogues.en: - Did you read it? - Of course, I read it.

dialogues.cn: 娜梅莉亚公主到了多恩以后
dialogues.en: When Princess Nymeria arrived in Dorne

dialogues.cn: 选择的丈夫是谁？
dialogues.en: who did she take to husband?

dialogues.cn: 一个男的
dialogues.en: A man.

dialogues.cn: 他的名字是？
dialogues.en: What was his name?

dialogues.cn: 某某大人
dialogues.en: Lord Something.

dialogues.cn: 如果你拿“某某大人”当答案 玛洛修女得气疯了
dialogues.en: If you answer with "Lord Something," Septa Marlow will be furious.

dialogues.cn: 她生起气来可好玩了
dialogues.en: She's funny when she's furious.

dialogues.cn: 你有心事的时候就是现在这样
dialogues.en: You're always like this when you're worried.

dialogues.cn: 哪样？
dialogues.en: Like what?

dialogues.cn: 不好相处
dialogues.en: Disagreeable.

dialogues.cn: 你担心你父亲会因为有了儿子
dialogues.en: You're worried your father is about to overshadow you

dialogues.cn: 而忽略你
dialogues.en: with a son.

dialogues.cn: 我只是替我母亲担心
dialogues.en: I only worry for my mother.

dialogues.cn: 我希望父亲能有个儿子
dialogues.en: I hope for my father that he gets a son.

dialogues.cn: 从我记事开始 这就是他一直想要的
dialogues.en: As long as I can recall, it's all he's wanted.

dialogues.cn: 你希望他有儿子？
dialogues.en: You want him to have a son?

dialogues.cn: 我希望能和你一起骑龙
dialogues.en: I want to fly with you on dragonback

dialogues.cn: 飞越狭海 看看那边的奇观
dialogues.en: see the great wonders across the Narrow Sea

dialogues.cn: 还希望只吃蛋糕
dialogues.en: and eat only cake.

dialogues.cn: - 我是认真的 - 我从不拿蛋糕开玩笑
dialogues.en: - I'm being serious. - I never jest about cake.

dialogues.cn: 你不担心你的位置吗？
dialogues.en: You aren't worried about your position?

dialogues.cn: 我喜欢现在的位置 非常舒服
dialogues.en: I like this position. It's quite comfortable.

dialogues.cn: 你要去哪儿？
dialogues.en: Where are you going?

dialogues.cn: 回家 时间晚了
dialogues.en: Home. The hour has grown late.

dialogues.cn: 娜梅莉亚公主带领洛伊拿人乘坐一万艘船横渡狭海
dialogues.en: Princess Nymeria led her Rhoynar across the Narrow Sea on 10,000 ships

dialogues.cn: 以躲避瓦雷利亚人的追捕
dialogues.en: to flee their Valyrian pursuers.

dialogues.cn: 她选了多恩的莫尔斯·马泰尔作丈夫
dialogues.en: She took Lord Mors Martell of Dorne to husband

dialogues.cn: 在阳戟城下烧毁了她的整支舰队
dialogues.en: and burned her own fleet off Sunspear

dialogues.cn: 以宣告她的子民从今以后无需逃亡
dialogues.en: to show her people that they were finished running.

dialogues.cn: - 你在干嘛？ - 这样你才能记住
dialogues.en: - What are you doing? - So you remember.

dialogues.cn: - 如果修女看到这本书 那…… - 去他妈的修女
dialogues.en: - If the Septa sees this book then... - Fuck the Septa.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉！
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra!

dialogues.cn: 在愈合了吗？
dialogues.en: Is it healing?

dialogues.cn: 愈合得很慢 陛下
dialogues.en: It has grown slightly, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 现在知道这是什么了吗？
dialogues.en: Can you say yet what it is?

dialogues.cn: 我们已经向学城发信询问
dialogues.en: We've sent inquiries to the Citadel.

dialogues.cn: 他们正在书中查找相似的案例
dialogues.en: They are searching the texts for similar cases.

dialogues.cn: 这只是被王座割开的细小伤口
dialogues.en: It's a small cut from sitting the throne.

dialogues.cn: 没什么大事
dialogues.en: It's nothing.

dialogues.cn: 国王承受了巨大的压力
dialogues.en: The King has been under heavy stresses

dialogues.cn: 因为要为新生儿作准备
dialogues.en: preparing for the birth.

dialogues.cn: 不良的精神状态会对身体造成不好的影响
dialogues.en: Bad humors of the mind can adversely affect the body.

dialogues.cn: 不论是什么事 都不要声张
dialogues.en: Whatever it is, it needs to be kept quiet.

dialogues.cn: 我们应该再用水蛭放血 学士
dialogues.en: We should leech it again, maester.

dialogues.cn: 这伤口无法愈合 大学士
dialogues.en: It's a wound that refuses to heal, Grand Maester.

dialogues.cn: 我能否建议用烧灼疗法试试？
dialogues.en: Might I suggest cauterization?

dialogues.cn: 烧灼疗法也许是明智之举 陛下
dialogues.en: Cauterization would be a wise course of treatment, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: - 只是那会很疼…… - 好吧
dialogues.en: - It will be painful... - Fine.

dialogues.cn: 就这样
dialogues.en: Fine.

dialogues.cn: 你泡在浴缸里的时间比我坐在铁王座上的时间还久
dialogues.en: You spend more time in that bath than I do on the throne.

dialogues.cn: 这是这些天来唯一一处让我感到舒适的地方
dialogues.en: This is the only place I can find comfort these days.

dialogues.cn: 只有一点温
dialogues.en: It's tepid.

dialogues.cn: 学士们不允许更烫
dialogues.en: It's as warm as the maesters will allow.

dialogues.cn: 他们难道不知道龙喜欢热吗？
dialogues.en: Don't they know dragons prefer heat?

dialogues.cn: 经历这次痛苦的孕期后
dialogues.en: After this miserable pregnancy

dialogues.cn: 我若生出一条真龙 都不觉得奇怪了
dialogues.en: I wouldn't be surprised if I hatched an actual dragon.

dialogues.cn: 那他会受到疼爱和珍视
dialogues.en: Then he will be loved and cherished.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉已经宣布自己会有个妹妹了
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra has already declared that she is to have a sister.

dialogues.cn: 真的么？
dialogues.en: Really?

dialogues.cn: - 她甚至为她取好了名字. - 我能问吗？
dialogues.en: - She even named her. - Dare I ask?

dialogues.cn: 维桑尼亚
dialogues.en: Visenya.

dialogues.cn: 她已经选好了放进摇篮的龙蛋
dialogues.en: She chose a dragon's egg for the cradle

dialogues.cn: 她说这枚蛋让她想起了瓦格哈尔
dialogues.en: that she said reminded her of Vhagar.

dialogues.cn: 诸神慈悲
dialogues.en: Gods be good.

dialogues.cn: 这个家庭已经有了个维桑尼亚
dialogues.en: This family already has its Visenya.

dialogues.cn: 有你亲爱的弟弟的消息吗？
dialogues.en: Has there been any word from your dear brother?

dialogues.cn: 自从任命他为都城守备队司令后就没个信了
dialogues.en: Not since I named him Commander of the City Watch.

dialogues.cn: 我相信他一定会出现在比武大会
dialogues.en: I'm sure he will reemerge for the tourney.

dialogues.cn: 他向来无法拒绝亲自参赛
dialogues.en: He could never stay away from the lists.

dialogues.cn: 比武大会
dialogues.en: The tourney

dialogues.cn: 为庆祝我们还未出世的长子而办
dialogues.en: to celebrate the firstborn son that we presently do not have.

dialogues.cn: 你得明白
dialogues.en: You do understand

dialogues.cn: 要是本来没有，也不会凭空长出阴茎来。
dialogues.en: nothing will cause the babe to grow a cock

dialogues.cn: 也没什么办法硬长出来吧？
dialogues.en: if it does not already possess one?

dialogues.cn: 这是个男孩 爱玛
dialogues.en: This child is a boy, Aemma.

dialogues.cn: 我很确定
dialogues.en: I'm certain of it.

dialogues.cn: 我从来没有这么确定过
dialogues.en: I've never been more certain of anything.

dialogues.cn: 那个梦
dialogues.en: The dream.

dialogues.cn: 比记忆还清晰
dialogues.en: It was clearer than a memory.

dialogues.cn: 我们的儿子戴着伊耿的王冠降生
dialogues.en: Our son was born wearing Aegon's iron crown.

dialogues.cn: 我听到雷鸣般的马蹄声
dialogues.en: When I heard the sound of thundering hooves

dialogues.cn: 盾牌破碎和挥剑的声音
dialogues.en: splintering shields, and ringing swords

dialogues.cn: 我把我们的儿子放在铁王座上
dialogues.en: and I placed our son upon the Iron Throne

dialogues.cn: 圣堂的钟声响起 所有巨龙齐声而吼
dialogues.en: as the bells of the Grand Sept tolled and all the dragons roared as one.

dialogues.cn: 戴着王冠出生？
dialogues.en: Born wearing a crown?

dialogues.cn: 诸神救救我吧 生孩子已经很难受了
dialogues.en: Gods spare me, birth is unpleasant enough as it is.

dialogues.cn: 这是最后一次了吗 韦赛里斯
dialogues.en: This is the last time, Viserys.

dialogues.cn: 我有个宝宝死于襁褓 生下过两个死胎
dialogues.en: I've lost one babe in the cradle, had two stillbirths

dialogues.cn: 还有两次怀孕在足月前就结束了
dialogues.en: and two pregnancies ended well before their term.

dialogues.cn: 五个孩子 前后耗费了十年
dialogues.en: That's five in twice as many years.

dialogues.cn: 我知道 为你生下继承人是我的责任
dialogues.en: I know it is my duty to provide you an heir

dialogues.cn: 如果为此让你失望了 我很抱歉
dialogues.en: and I'm sorry if I have failed you in that.

dialogues.cn: 真的很抱歉
dialogues.en: I am.

dialogues.cn: 但我没法再悼念更多死去的孩子了
dialogues.en: But I've mourned all the dead children I can.

dialogues.cn: 司令到场！
dialogues.en: Commander on the floor!

dialogues.cn: 当我接下都城守备队司令一职时 你们还是一群
dialogues.en: When I took command of the Watch, you were stray mongrels

dialogues.cn: 饥饿散漫的野狗
dialogues.en: starving and undisciplined.

dialogues.cn: 如今 你们成为了一队猎犬
dialogues.en: Now, you're a pack of hounds.

dialogues.cn: 酒足饭饱 历经磨练 随时可以狩猎
dialogues.en: You're sated and honed for the hunt.

dialogues.cn: 我哥哥的城市已经变得堕落不堪
dialogues.en: My brother's city has fallen into squalor.

dialogues.cn: 各种罪行肆意滋生 猖獗横行
dialogues.en: Crime of every breed has been allowed to thrive.

dialogues.cn: 这种日子到头了
dialogues.en: No longer.

dialogues.cn: 从今晚起
dialogues.en: Beginning tonight

dialogues.cn: 君临将学会畏惧金色
dialogues.en: King's Landing will learn to fear the color gold.

dialogues.cn: 起身！
dialogues.en: Get up!

dialogues.cn: 强奸犯！
dialogues.en: Raper!

dialogues.cn: 不！不要……不！
dialogues.en: No! No... no!

dialogues.cn: 小偷！
dialogues.en: Thief!

dialogues.cn: 不！
dialogues.en: No!

dialogues.cn: 杀人犯！
dialogues.en: Murderer!

dialogues.cn: 这是一次对各类犯罪的空前围捕
dialogues.en: It was an unprecedented roundup of criminals of every ilk.

dialogues.cn: 你弟弟当众做秀
dialogues.en: Your brother made a public show of it

dialogues.cn: 亲自做出裁决
dialogues.en: meting out the summary judgments himself.

dialogues.cn: 我听说他们得用双驾马车
dialogues.en: I'm told they needed a two-horse cart

dialogues.cn: 才拉走了所有被肢解的人体
dialogues.en: to haul away the resulting dismemberments when it was done.

dialogues.cn: 诸神慈悲
dialogues.en: Gods be good.

dialogues.cn: 不能让王子如此肆无忌惮 还逍遥法外
dialogues.en: The Prince cannot be allowed to act with this kind of unchecked impunity.

dialogues.cn: - 哥哥 - 戴蒙
dialogues.en: - Brother. - Daemon.

dialogues.cn: 继续啊 你刚正说我逍遥法外的事
dialogues.en: Carry on. You were saying something about my impunity.

dialogues.cn: 你需要解释一下你带领都城守备队的所作所为
dialogues.en: You are to explain your doings with the City Watch.

dialogues.cn: 你新组的金袍子
dialogues.en: Your new gold cloaks

dialogues.cn: 昨晚干了一番大事  不是吗？
dialogues.en: made quite the impression last night, didn't they?

dialogues.cn: 是吗？
dialogues.en: Did they?

dialogues.cn: 都城守备队可不是你想挥就挥的剑
dialogues.en: The City Watch is not a sword to be wielded at your whim.

dialogues.cn: 他们是国王权力的延伸
dialogues.en: They're an extension of the crown.

dialogues.cn: 都城守备等同于执行着国王的法律
dialogues.en: The Watch was enforcing the crown's laws.

dialogues.cn: 你不同意吗 斯壮大人？
dialogues.en: Wouldn't you agree, Lord Strong?

dialogues.cn: 王子殿下 我不认为……
dialogues.en: My Prince, I don't think...

dialogues.cn: 在公众面前肆意展示暴行
dialogues.en: Making a public spectacle of wanton brutality

dialogues.cn: 与我们的法律毫无关系
dialogues.en: is hardly in line with our laws.

dialogues.cn: 全境各地的贵族
dialogues.en: Nobles from every corner of the realm

dialogues.cn: 而今都将聚集在君临
dialogues.en: are right now descending upon King's Landing

dialogues.cn: 来参加我哥哥的比武大会
dialogues.en: for my brother's tourney.

dialogues.cn: 你难道想这些贵族被抢劫 被强暴 被谋杀吗？
dialogues.en: Do you want them mugged, raped, murdered?

dialogues.cn: 除非你离开红堡的安全地带 才会知道这些
dialogues.en: You mightn't know this unless you left the safety of the Red Keep

dialogues.cn: 君临的大部分地区 在老百姓眼里都是
dialogues.en: but much of King's Landing is seen by the smallfolk

dialogues.cn: 无法无天的可怕去处
dialogues.en: as lawless and terrifying.

dialogues.cn: 我们的城市应该让所有人感到安全
dialogues.en: Our city should be safe for all its people.

dialogues.cn: 我同意
dialogues.en: I agree.

dialogues.cn: 我只是希望你不要把我的都城中一半的人弄残就能实现这点
dialogues.en: I just hope you don't have to maim half of my city to achieve this.

dialogues.cn: 时间会证明一切
dialogues.en: Time will tell.

dialogues.cn: 我们任命戴蒙王子为司令
dialogues.en: We installed Prince Daemon as commander

dialogues.cn: 来改善法律和秩序
dialogues.en: to promote law and order.

dialogues.cn: 犯罪分子理当惧怕都城守备队
dialogues.en: The criminal element should fear the City Watch.

dialogues.cn: 谢谢你的支持 科利斯伯爵
dialogues.en: Thank you for your support, Lord Corlys.

dialogues.cn: 倘若王子能对他的夫人
dialogues.en: If only the Prince would show the same devotion

dialogues.cn: 像对工作一样热情就好了 陛下
dialogues.en: to his lady wife as he does his work, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 你很久没有去谷地或符石城了
dialogues.en: You've not been seen in the Vale or at Runestone for quite some time.

dialogues.cn: 我不去那边 我的青铜婊子可能更开心些
dialogues.en: I think my bronze bitch is happier for my absence.

dialogues.cn: 雷娅夫人是你的妻子
dialogues.en: Lady Rhea is your wife.

dialogues.cn: 一位善良可敬的谷地女士
dialogues.en: A good and honorable lady of the Vale.

dialogues.cn: 在谷地 听说男人操羊而不是女人
dialogues.en: In the Vale, men are said to fuck sheep instead of women.

dialogues.cn: 我敢向你保证 羊美多了
dialogues.en: I can assure you, the sheep are prettier.

dialogues.cn: 天哪
dialogues.en: Dear me.

dialogues.cn: 你在七神面前发过誓 在婚姻中会尊重你的妻子
dialogues.en: You made a vow before the Seven to honor your wife in marriage.

dialogues.cn: 那么我很乐意将雷娅夫人送给你 海塔尔伯爵
dialogues.en: Well, I'd gladly give Lady Rhea to you, Lord Hightower

dialogues.cn: 如果你需要女人暖床的话
dialogues.en: if you're in want of a woman to warm your bed.

dialogues.cn: 你的妻子刚好最近过世
dialogues.en: Your own lady wife passed recently.

dialogues.cn: 不是吗？
dialogues.en: Did she not?

dialogues.cn: 奥托
dialogues.en: Otto.

dialogues.cn: 也许你还没从悲伤中走出来
dialogues.en: Perhaps you aren't ready to move on just yet.

dialogues.cn: 你知道我弟弟总喜欢刺激你
dialogues.en: You know how my brother makes sport of provoking you.

dialogues.cn: 你非得上当吗？
dialogues.en: Must you indulge him?

dialogues.cn: 我的错 陛下
dialogues.en: My apologies, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 御前会议可是花了大价钱
dialogues.en: This council has, at great expense

dialogues.cn: 才将都城守备队改善到你要求的标准
dialogues.en: bettered the City Watch to your exacting standards.

dialogues.cn: 执行我的法律 但要明白
dialogues.en: Enforce my laws, but understand

dialogues.cn: 如果再有昨晚那样的行动 将会受到惩罚
dialogues.en: any further performances like last night's will be answered.

dialogues.cn: 知道了 陛下
dialogues.en: Understood, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我祖母去世后 君临治安每况愈下
dialogues.en: King's Landing has been in decline since my grandmother passed.

dialogues.cn: 到头来
dialogues.en: In the end

dialogues.cn: 这个新的都城守备队可能是个好事
dialogues.en: this new City Watch might be a good thing.

dialogues.cn: 是什么惹你心烦 我的王子？
dialogues.en: What troubles you, my Prince?

dialogues.cn: 我可以再叫来一个人
dialogues.en: I could bring in another.

dialogues.cn: 或者找个处女
dialogues.en: Perhaps a maiden.

dialogues.cn: 我有好几个
dialogues.en: I have several.

dialogues.cn: 甚至可以安排个银发姑娘
dialogues.en: I could even arrange one with silver hair.

dialogues.cn: 你是戴蒙·坦格利安
dialogues.en: You are Daemon Targaryen.

dialogues.cn: 科拉克休的骑手 暗黑姐妹的持有者
dialogues.en: Rider of Caraxes. Wielder of Dark Sister.

dialogues.cn: 国王无法找人取代你
dialogues.en: The King cannot replace you.

dialogues.cn: 欢迎！
dialogues.en: Be welcome!

dialogues.cn: 我知道你们很多人为了参加这次比武大会
dialogues.en: I know many of you have traveled long leagues

dialogues.cn: 都远道而来
dialogues.en: to be at these games

dialogues.cn: 但我保证 你们不会失望的
dialogues.en: but I promise, you will not be disappointed.

dialogues.cn: 当我看着名单中这些优秀的骑士时
dialogues.en: When I look at the fine knights in these lists

dialogues.cn: 我看到了一群无可匹敌的勇士
dialogues.en: I see a group without equal in our histories.

dialogues.cn: 而且这个伟大的日子还有更多吉兆
dialogues.en: And this great day has been made more auspicious

dialogues.cn: 我很开心地宣布这个消息
dialogues.en: by the news that I am happy to share.

dialogues.cn: 爱玛王后已经开始分娩了！
dialogues.en: Queen Aemma has begun her labors!

dialogues.cn: 愿七神的好运降临在所有参赛者身上！
dialogues.en: May the luck of the Seven shine upon all combatants!

dialogues.cn: 一个神秘骑士？
dialogues.en: A mystery knight?

dialogues.cn: 不 科尔家的人 来自风暴地
dialogues.en: No, a Cole, of the Stormlands.

dialogues.cn: 我从没听说过科尔家族
dialogues.en: I've never heard of House Cole.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮丝·坦格利安公主！
dialogues.en: Princess Rhaenys Targaryen!

dialogues.cn: 我在此恭请无冕女王的信物
dialogues.en: I would humbly ask for the favor of The Queen Who Never Was.

dialogues.cn: 祝你好运 老表
dialogues.en: Good fortune to you, cousin.

dialogues.cn: 如果我需要好运的话 会乐意接受它的
dialogues.en: I would gladly take it if I thought I needed it.

dialogues.cn: 就冲这番话 你可以把拜拉席恩的舌头割下来
dialogues.en: You could have Baratheon's tongue for that.

dialogues.cn: 舌头又不会改变继承人
dialogues.en: Tongues will not change the succession.

dialogues.cn: 随他去吧
dialogues.en: Let them wag.

dialogues.cn: 史铎克渥斯伯爵的女儿
dialogues.en: Lord Stokeworth's daughter

dialogues.cn: 已经被许给了那个塔利家的年轻侍从
dialogues.en: is promised to that young Tarly squire.

dialogues.cn: 马赛伯爵的儿子？
dialogues.en: Lord Massey's son?

dialogues.cn: 等他获得骑士头衔 便会完婚
dialogues.en: They're to be married as soon as he wins his knighthood.

dialogues.cn: 最好快点
dialogues.en: Best get on with it.

dialogues.cn: 我听说埃萝小姐
dialogues.en: I heard that Lady Elinor

dialogues.cn: 努力藏着裙子下面隆起的肚子
dialogues.en: is hiding a swollen belly beneath her dress.

dialogues.cn: 你对克里斯顿·科尔爵士了解多少 哈罗德爵士？
dialogues.en: What do you know about this Ser Criston Cole, Ser Harrold?

dialogues.cn: 我听说克里斯顿爵士出身平民 是唐德利恩伯爵管家的儿子
dialogues.en: I'm told Ser Criston is common-born, son of Lord Dondarrion's steward.

dialogues.cn: 除了这个 以及他刚刚把
dialogues.en: But other than that, and the fact that he's just unhorsed

dialogues.cn: 拜拉席恩家的两个孩子打下马的事实 我就不知道了
dialogues.en: both of the Baratheon lads, I really couldn't say.

dialogues.cn: 坦格利安家族的戴蒙王子
dialogues.en: Prince Daemon of House Targaryen!

dialogues.cn: 首都亲王即将选择他的第一位对手
dialogues.en: Prince of the City will now choose his first opponent!

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙·坦格利安的第一位对手是——
dialogues.en: For his first challenge, Prince Daemon Targaryen chooses

dialogues.cn: 旧镇的加尔温·海塔尔爵士 首相的长子
dialogues.en: Ser Gwayne Hightower of Oldtown, eldest son of the Hand of the King.

dialogues.cn: 五金龙押戴蒙
dialogues.en: Five dragons on Daemon.

dialogues.cn: - 干得漂亮 叔叔 - 谢谢你 公主
dialogues.en: - Nicely done, Uncle. - Thank you, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 我敢说 我胜券在握 阿莉森小姐
dialogues.en: Now, I'm fairly certain I can win these games, Lady Alicent.

dialogues.cn: 得到你的信物会让我如虎添翼
dialogues.en: Having your favor would all but assure it.

dialogues.cn: 祝你好运 王子
dialogues.en: Good luck, my Prince.

dialogues.cn: 用力！
dialogues.en: Come on!

dialogues.cn: 怎么回事？
dialogues.en: What's happening?

dialogues.cn: 陛下 胎儿是臀位
dialogues.en: The infant is in breech, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 所有扶正胎位的尝试都失败了
dialogues.en: All attempts to turn the babe have failed.

dialogues.cn: 别干看着啊！
dialogues.en: Do something for her!

dialogues.cn: 我们已经给了她很多罂粟花奶
dialogues.en: We've given her as much milk of the poppy as we can

dialogues.cn: 再加量孩子就有危险
dialogues.en: without risking the child.

dialogues.cn: 王后是位坚强的女性
dialogues.en: Your Queen is a strong woman.

dialogues.cn: 她已经拼劲全力了 但恐怕还是不行
dialogues.en: She's fighting with all her might, but it may not be enough.

dialogues.cn: 不！
dialogues.en: No!

dialogues.cn: 艾玛
dialogues.en: Aemma.

dialogues.cn: 艾玛 我在的
dialogues.en: Aemma, I'm here.

dialogues.cn: 我在
dialogues.en: I'm here.

dialogues.cn: 有我在 没事的
dialogues.en: I'm here. It's all right.

dialogues.cn: - 没事的 - 我不想继续了
dialogues.en: - It's all right. - I don't wanna do this.

dialogues.cn: 你不会有事的
dialogues.en: You're going to be all right.

dialogues.cn: 不会有事的
dialogues.en: You're going to be all right.

dialogues.cn: 抓住我的手
dialogues.en: Hold my hand.

dialogues.cn: 杀了他！
dialogues.en: Kill him!

dialogues.cn: 真是越来越难看了
dialogues.en: And the day grows ugly.

dialogues.cn: 真不知是否应该用这样的方式
dialogues.en: I wonder if this is how we should celebrate

dialogues.cn: 来庆祝王储的诞生
dialogues.en: the birth of our future king.

dialogues.cn: 如此挥霍暴力
dialogues.en: With wanton violence.

dialogues.cn: 梅葛国王死后 已经过了七十年
dialogues.en: It's been 70 years since King Maegor's end.

dialogues.cn: 这群骑士都嫩得像夏天的青草
dialogues.en: These knights are as green as summer grass.

dialogues.cn: 他们都没见识过真正的战争
dialogues.en: None have known real war.

dialogues.cn: 封君把他们送到比武场上
dialogues.en: Their lords sent them to the tourney field

dialogues.cn: 手中握剑精力充沛 胯下宝剑也是干劲十足
dialogues.en: with fists full of steel and balls full of seed

dialogues.cn: 而我们还指望他们表现得荣誉而优雅
dialogues.en: and we expect them to act with honor and grace.

dialogues.cn: 这一滴血没引发战争就已经是奇迹了
dialogues.en: It's a marvel that war didn't break out at first blood.

dialogues.cn: 梅罗斯？
dialogues.en: Mellos?

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 请来一下
dialogues.en: If you would.

dialogues.cn: 难产的时候
dialogues.en: During a difficult birth

dialogues.cn: 父亲有时候不得不
dialogues.en: it sometimes becomes necessary for the father

dialogues.cn: 做出艰难抉择
dialogues.en: to make an impossible choice.

dialogues.cn: 说吧
dialogues.en: Well, speak it.

dialogues.cn: 是牺牲一个 还是一尸两命
dialogues.en: To sacrifice one or to lose them both.

dialogues.cn: 有保住孩子的可能
dialogues.en: There is a chance that we can save the child.

dialogues.cn: 学城教授过一件技艺
dialogues.en: A technique is taught at the Citadel

dialogues.cn: 可以直接剖开子宫
dialogues.en: which involves cutting directly into the womb

dialogues.cn: 取出婴儿
dialogues.en: to free the infant.

dialogues.cn: - 但伴随的失血…… - 七层地狱 梅罗斯
dialogues.en: - But the resulting blood loss... - Seven Hells, Mellos.

dialogues.cn: 你能保住孩子？
dialogues.en: You can save the child?

dialogues.cn: 必须立刻行动 否则就只能托付诸神了
dialogues.en: We must either act now or leave it with the gods.

dialogues.cn: 克里斯顿·科尔爵士的长枪比武对手
dialogues.en: Ser Criston Cole will now tilt

dialogues.cn: 是戴蒙·坦格利安 首都亲王！
dialogues.en: against Ser Daemon Targaryen, Prince of the City!

dialogues.cn: 枪！
dialogues.en: Lance!

dialogues.cn: - 韦赛里斯 - 我在
dialogues.en: - Viserys. - Yes?

dialogues.cn: 他们现在要把孩子取出来了
dialogues.en: They're going to bring the babe out now.

dialogues.cn: 我爱你
dialogues.en: I love you.

dialogues.cn: - 怎么了？ - 没事的
dialogues.en: - What is happening? - No, it's all right.

dialogues.cn: 不要 怎么了？
dialogues.en: No, what is happening?

dialogues.cn: - 韦赛里斯 怎么…… - 没事的
dialogues.en: - Viserys, what... - No, it's all right.

dialogues.cn: - 你们要干什么？ - 他们要把孩子取出来
dialogues.en: - What are you doing? - They're going to bring the babe out.

dialogues.cn: 他们怎么……
dialogues.en: How are they...

dialogues.cn: - 没事的 - 韦赛里斯 求你了
dialogues.en: - It's all right. - Viserys, please...

dialogues.cn: - 没事的 - 不 我害怕
dialogues.en: - It's all right. - No, I'm scared.

dialogues.cn: - 别怕 - 怎么回事啊？
dialogues.en: - Don't be scared. - What is happening?

dialogues.cn: 别害怕 他们要取出孩子
dialogues.en: Don't be scared. They're going to bring the babe out.

dialogues.cn: - 哦不 - 没事的
dialogues.en: - Oh no. - It's all right.

dialogues.cn: 他们要取出孩子
dialogues.en: They're going to bring the babe out.

dialogues.cn: 不 不要！
dialogues.en: No... no!

dialogues.cn: 我要在这里切第一刀
dialogues.en: I'm making the first incision.

dialogues.cn: 不 不！
dialogues.en: No... no!

dialogues.cn: 韦赛里斯 别这样！求你了！
dialogues.en: Viserys, no! Please!

dialogues.cn: - 不……不要！ - 别怕
dialogues.en: - No... no! - Don't be scared.

dialogues.cn: 剑！
dialogues.en: Sword!

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙·坦格利安王子
dialogues.en: Prince Daemon Targaryen

dialogues.cn: 希望继续徒步比武！
dialogues.en: wishes to continue in a contest of arms!

dialogues.cn: 投降吧
dialogues.en: Yield.

dialogues.cn: 投降
dialogues.en: Yield.

dialogues.cn: 诸神啊！他是多恩人
dialogues.en: Gods. He's Dornish.

dialogues.cn: 我希望得到公主的信物
dialogues.en: I was hoping to ask for the Princess's favor.

dialogues.cn: 祝你好运 克里斯顿爵士
dialogues.en: I wish you luck, Ser Criston.

dialogues.cn: 公主
dialogues.en: Princess.

dialogues.cn: 祝贺您 陛下
dialogues.en: Congratulations, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 您有儿子了
dialogues.en: You have a son.

dialogues.cn: 是男孩？
dialogues.en: It's a boy?

dialogues.cn: 新的继承人 陛下
dialogues.en: A new heir, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 您和王后起好名字了吗？
dialogues.en: Had you and the Queen chosen a name?

dialogues.cn: 贝尔隆
dialogues.en: Baelon.

dialogues.cn: 他们都在等你
dialogues.en: They're waiting for you.

dialogues.cn: 龙焰
dialogues.en: Dracarys.

dialogues.cn: - 雷妮拉呢？- 陛下
dialogues.en: - Where's Rhaenyra? - Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 在这黑暗的时刻 我们极其不愿讨论这件事
dialogues.en: This is the last thing any of us wish to discuss

dialogues.cn: 但我认为事关紧要
dialogues.en: at this dark hour, but I consider the matter urgent.

dialogues.cn: 什么事？
dialogues.en: What matter?

dialogues.cn: 继承人的事
dialogues.en: That of your succession.

dialogues.cn: 刚发生的两件悲剧
dialogues.en: These recent tragedies

dialogues.cn: 使您失去了明确的继承人
dialogues.en: have left you without an obvious heir.

dialogues.cn: 国王有继承人 首相大人
dialogues.en: The King has an heir, my Lord Hand.

dialogues.cn: 尽管现在是难受的时候 陛下
dialogues.en: Despite how difficult this time is, Your Grace

dialogues.cn: 我认为极有必要确定继承人
dialogues.en: I feel it important the succession be firmly in place

dialogues.cn: 以维护王国的稳定
dialogues.en: for the stability of the realm.

dialogues.cn: 继承人早已根据惯例和律法选定
dialogues.en: The succession is already set by precedent and by law.

dialogues.cn: 不妨说出他的名字？
dialogues.en: Shall we say his name?

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙·坦格利安
dialogues.en: Daemon Targaryen.

dialogues.cn: 如果依然让戴蒙作为无可争议的继承人
dialogues.en: If Daemon were to remain the uncontested heir

dialogues.cn: 可能带来王国的动荡
dialogues.en: it could destabilize the realm.

dialogues.cn: 王国？还是御前会议？
dialogues.en: The realm? Or this council?

dialogues.cn: 在座诸位谁都不知道戴蒙会成为什么样的国王
dialogues.en: No one here can know what Daemon would do were he king

dialogues.cn: 但没人会怀疑他的野心
dialogues.en: but no one can doubt his ambition.

dialogues.cn: 看看他用金袍子干了什么
dialogues.en: Look at what he did with the gold cloaks.

dialogues.cn: 都城守备队对他忠心耿耿
dialogues.en: The City Watch is fiercely loyal to him.

dialogues.cn: - 一支两千人的军队 - 一支你给他的军队 奥托
dialogues.en: - An army 2,000 strong. - An army you gave him, Otto.

dialogues.cn: 我任命戴蒙为法务大臣 你说他是个暴君
dialogues.en: I named Daemon Master of Laws, but you said he was a tyrant.

dialogues.cn: 任命他为财政大臣
dialogues.en: As Master of Coin

dialogues.cn: 你说他挥霍无度 会让国家破产
dialogues.en: you said he was a spendthrift that would beggar the realm.

dialogues.cn: 让戴蒙去领导都城守备队正是你的解决之道！
dialogues.en: Putting Daemon in command of the City Watch was your solution!

dialogues.cn: 是权宜之计 陛下
dialogues.en: A half-measure, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 事实是 戴蒙应该远离宫廷
dialogues.en: The truth is, Daemon should be far away from this court.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙是我的弟弟
dialogues.en: Daemon is my brother.

dialogues.cn: 我的血亲
dialogues.en: My blood.

dialogues.cn: 他会在我的宫中有一席之地
dialogues.en: And he will have his place at my court.

dialogues.cn: 那就给他在宫中留下一席之地吧 陛下
dialogues.en: Let him keep his place at court, Your Grace

dialogues.cn: 但如果七神将更多悲剧降临到您身上
dialogues.en: but if the gods should visit some further tragedy on you

dialogues.cn: - 有意无意之间…… - “有意”？
dialogues.en: - either by design or accident... - "Design"?

dialogues.cn: 你是什么意思？
dialogues.en: What are you saying?

dialogues.cn: 我弟弟会杀死我 夺走王位？
dialogues.en: My brother would murder me, take my crown?

dialogues.cn: 是吗？
dialogues.en: Are you?

dialogues.cn: 拜托
dialogues.en: Please.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙是有野心 没错 但不是觊觎铁王座
dialogues.en: Daemon has ambition, yes, but not for the throne.

dialogues.cn: 他对这事没有耐心
dialogues.en: He lacks the patience for it.

dialogues.cn: 诸神还没有创造出
dialogues.en: The gods have yet to make a man

dialogues.cn: 一个对绝对权力没有耐心的人呢 陛下
dialogues.en: who lacks the patience for absolute power, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 在这种情况下 国王指定一个继承人
dialogues.en: Under such circumstances, it would not be an aberration

dialogues.cn: 倒也不算脱离常规
dialogues.en: for the King to name a successor.

dialogues.cn: 那么 还有谁有资格呢？
dialogues.en: Well, who else would have a claim?

dialogues.cn: 国王的第一个孩子
dialogues.en: The King's firstborn child.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉？一个女孩？
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra? A girl?

dialogues.cn: 铁王座上从没坐过女王
dialogues.en: No queen has ever sat the Iron Throne.

dialogues.cn: 这只是依据传统和先例罢了 斯壮大人
dialogues.en: That is only by tradition and precedent, Lord Strong.

dialogues.cn: 如果御前会议这么关心秩序和稳定
dialogues.en: If order and stability so concerns this council

dialogues.cn: 那么我们或许不应该打破百年来的传统
dialogues.en: then perhaps we shouldn't break 100 years of it

dialogues.cn: 让一个女孩成为王嗣
dialogues.en: by naming a girl heir.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙会成为第二个梅葛 甚至更糟
dialogues.en: Daemon would be a second Maegor, or worse.

dialogues.cn: 他冲动而又暴力
dialogues.en: He is impulsive and violent.

dialogues.cn: 保护国王和他的王国不受戴蒙侵害
dialogues.en: It is the duty of this council

dialogues.cn: 正是我们这个御前会议的责任
dialogues.en: to protect the King and the realm from him.

dialogues.cn: 抱歉 陛下 但这恐怕不是我所看到的真相
dialogues.en: I'm sorry, Your Grace, but that is the truth as I see it

dialogues.cn: 而且我知道这里有人跟我想法一致
dialogues.en: and I know that others here agree.

dialogues.cn: 我是不会被迫在我的兄弟和女儿之间做出选择的
dialogues.en: I will not be made to choose between my brother and my daughter.

dialogues.cn: 您不必如此 陛下
dialogues.en: You wouldn't have to, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 还有其他人选
dialogues.en: There are others who would have a claim.

dialogues.cn: 比如你的夫人？科利斯大人
dialogues.en: Such as your wife, Lord Corlys?

dialogues.cn: 无冕女王？
dialogues.en: The Queen Who Never Was?

dialogues.cn: 雷妮丝是杰赫里斯一世长子的独女
dialogues.en: Rhaenys was the only child of Jaehaerys' eldest son.

dialogues.cn: 她在大议会时拥有很强的继承权主张
dialogues.en: She had a strong claim at the Great Council

dialogues.cn: 而且她已经有了一位男性继承人
dialogues.en: and she already has a male heir.

dialogues.cn: 就在刚刚 你才声明支持戴蒙
dialogues.en: Just moments ago, you announced your support for Daemon!

dialogues.cn: 如果我们都不能在继承人问题上取得一致 那还怎么指望……
dialogues.en: If we cannot agree on an heir, then how can we expect……

dialogues.cn: 我的妻儿都死了!
dialogues.en: My wife and son are dead!

dialogues.cn: 我不要再坐在这里忍受你们这群享用遗体的乌鸦!
dialogues.en: I will not sit here and suffer crows that come to feast on their corpses!

dialogues.cn: 派只渡鸦到旧镇去 马上
dialogues.en: Send a raven to Oldtown. Straight away.

dialogues.cn: 小姐
dialogues.en: My Lady.

dialogues.cn: 亲爱的
dialogues.en: My darling.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉怎么样了？
dialogues.en: How's Rhaenyra?

dialogues.cn: 她失去了母亲
dialogues.en: She lost her mother.

dialogues.cn: 王后一直受所有人爱戴
dialogues.en: The Queen has been well-loved by all.

dialogues.cn: 今天我也想起了你的母亲
dialogues.en: I found myself thinking of your own mother today.

dialogues.cn: - 陛下怎么样了？- 非常低落
dialogues.en: - How is His Grace? - Very low.

dialogues.cn: 所以我叫你来
dialogues.en: Which is why I sent for you.

dialogues.cn: 我认为你该去找他 安慰他
dialogues.en: I thought you might go to him, offer him comfort.

dialogues.cn: 去他房间？
dialogues.en: In his chambers?

dialogues.cn: 我不知道该说些什么
dialogues.en: I wouldn't know what to say.

dialogues.cn: 别咬了
dialogues.en: Stop that.

dialogues.cn: 他会很开心有人去看他
dialogues.en: He'll be glad of a visitor.

dialogues.cn: 可以穿条你母亲的裙子
dialogues.en: You might wear one of your mother's dresses.

dialogues.cn: 陛下 阿莉森·海塔尔小姐求见
dialogues.en: The Lady Alicent Hightower, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 什么事 阿莉森？
dialogues.en: What is it, Alicent?

dialogues.cn: 我觉得该来看看您 陛下
dialogues.en: I thought I might come and look in on you, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我带来了一本书
dialogues.en: I brought a book.

dialogues.cn: 真体贴 谢谢你
dialogues.en: That's very kind, thank you.

dialogues.cn: 这是我最爱的一本书
dialogues.en: It's a favorite of mine.

dialogues.cn: 我知道您有多热衷历史
dialogues.en: I do know how passionate you are for the histories.

dialogues.cn: 是的
dialogues.en: Yes, I am.

dialogues.cn: 我母亲离世的时候
dialogues.en: When my mother died

dialogues.cn: 人们只会拐弯抹角地和我说话
dialogues.en: people only ever spoke to me in riddles.

dialogues.cn: 而我想要的 只是有人能对我的遭遇
dialogues.en: All I wanted was for someone to say that they were sorry

dialogues.cn: 表示难过
dialogues.en: for what happened to me.

dialogues.cn: 我很难过 陛下
dialogues.en: I'm very sorry, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 谢谢
dialogues.en: Thank you.

dialogues.cn: 再次成为国王的唯一继承人
dialogues.en: The King's sole heir once again.

dialogues.cn: 不为我们的未来干一杯吗？
dialogues.en: Might we drink to our future?

dialogues.cn: 安静！
dialogues.en: Quiet!

dialogues.cn: 让王子来说几句！
dialogues.en: Your Prince will speak!

dialogues.cn: 安静！
dialogues.en: Silence!

dialogues.cn: 陛下 在我们开始会议之前
dialogues.en: Before we begin, Your Grace

dialogues.cn: 有必要分享我收到的一封密报
dialogues.en: I have a report I feel compelled to share.

dialogues.cn: 昨晚
dialogues.en: Last night

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙王子买断了丝绸街上的
dialogues.en: Prince Daemon bought out one of the pleasure houses

dialogues.cn: 一家青楼
dialogues.en: on the Street of Silk

dialogues.cn: 来款待都城守备队的士官
dialogues.en: to entertain officers of the City Watch

dialogues.cn: 以及他的一些朋友
dialogues.en: and other friends of his.

dialogues.cn: 国王和御前会议一直对我王位继承人的身份
dialogues.en: King and Council have long rued my position

dialogues.cn: 心生芥蒂
dialogues.en: as next in line for the throne.

dialogues.cn: 但随便他们怎么做梦和祈祷 我的位置看来不那么容易被取代
dialogues.en: But dream and pray as they all might, it seems I'm not so easily replaced.

dialogues.cn: 诸神一手给予 一手剥夺
dialogues.en: The gods give just as the gods take away.

dialogues.cn: 他为贝尔隆王子举杯
dialogues.en: He toasted Prince Baelon.

dialogues.cn: 敬国王之子
dialogues.en: To the King's son.

dialogues.cn: 称他为……
dialogues.en: Styling him...

dialogues.cn: 一日继承人
dialogues.en: the Heir for a Day.

dialogues.cn: 我和三名不同的证人确认了这份密报
dialogues.en: I corroborated this report with three separate witnesses.

dialogues.cn: 所有证据都表明 那晚是一场庆祝活动
dialogues.en: The evening was, by all accounts, a celebration.

dialogues.cn: 哥哥 你真是一副征服者的派头
dialogues.en: You cut the image of the Conqueror, brother.

dialogues.cn: 你说过吗？
dialogues.en: Did you say it?

dialogues.cn: 我不知道你指什么
dialogues.en: I don't know what you mean.

dialogues.cn: 你该称呼我为“陛下”
dialogues.en: You will address me as "Your Grace"

dialogues.cn: 否则我会让御林铁卫割下你的舌头
dialogues.en: or I will have my Kingsguard cut out your tongue.

dialogues.cn: "一日继承人" 你说过吗？
dialogues.en: "The Heir for a Day." Did you say it?

dialogues.cn: 我们都用自己的方式哀悼 陛下
dialogues.en: We must all mourn in our own way, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我的家庭刚毁了
dialogues.en: My family has just been destroyed.

dialogues.cn: 你却没待在我身边 或者雷妮拉身边
dialogues.en: But instead of being by my side, or Rhaenyra's

dialogues.cn: 而是选择去庆祝自己的晋升！
dialogues.en: you chose to celebrate your own rise!

dialogues.cn: 跟你的婊子和马屁精一起寻欢作乐！
dialogues.en: Laughing with your whores and your lickspittles!

dialogues.cn: 你在宫廷之上除了我没有其他盟友！
dialogues.en: You have no allies at court but me!

dialogues.cn: 我一直在维护你！
dialogues.en: I have only ever defended you!

dialogues.cn: 然而我给你的一切 你都弃之如敝屣扔回给了我
dialogues.en: Yet everything I've given you, you've thrown back in my face.

dialogues.cn: 你只想把我赶走
dialogues.en: You've only ever tried to send me away.

dialogues.cn: 去谷地 去都城守备队 去那些远离你的地方
dialogues.en: To the Vale, to the City Watch, anywhere but by your side.

dialogues.cn: 你已经当了十年国王
dialogues.en: Ten years you've been king

dialogues.cn: 但你从未要求我做你的国王之手！
dialogues.en: and yet not once have you asked me to be your Hand!

dialogues.cn: - 我为什么要那么做？ - 因为我是你的弟弟
dialogues.en: - Why would I do that? - Because I'm your brother.

dialogues.cn: 龙血浓于水
dialogues.en: And the blood of the dragon runs thick.

dialogues.cn: 那你为什么要伤我这么深？
dialogues.en: Then why do you cut me so deeply?

dialogues.cn: 我说的只是真相 我看得出奥托·海塔尔的本来面目
dialogues.en: I've only ever spoken the truth. I see Otto Hightower for what he is.

dialogues.cn: - 一位忠贞不移的国王之手？ - 一个婊子
dialogues.en: - An unwavering and loyal Hand? - A cunt.

dialogues.cn: 一个次子 没法继承任何东西
dialogues.en: A second son who stands to inherit nothing

dialogues.cn: 除非自己争取
dialogues.en: he doesn't seize for himself.

dialogues.cn: 奥托·海塔尔是一个值得尊敬的人
dialogues.en: Otto Hightower is a more honorable man

dialogues.cn: - 你这辈子也赶不上 - 他没有保护你
dialogues.en: - than you could ever be. - He doesn't protect you.

dialogues.cn: - 而我可以 - 从谁手中保护？
dialogues.en: - I would. - From what?

dialogues.cn: 你自己
dialogues.en: Yourself.

dialogues.cn: 你是个懦弱的人 韦赛里斯
dialogues.en: You're weak, Viserys.

dialogues.cn: 那些御前会议的水蛭都知道这一点
dialogues.en: And that council of leeches knows it.

dialogues.cn: 他们都为了自己的利益寄生在你身上
dialogues.en: They all prey on you for their own ends.

dialogues.cn: 我已决定任命一位新的继承人
dialogues.en: I have decided to name a new heir.

dialogues.cn: - 我就是你的继承人 - 不再是了
dialogues.en: - I'm your heir. - Not anymore.

dialogues.cn: 你要即刻回到符石城 回到你夫人身边
dialogues.en: You are to return to Runestone and your lady wife at once

dialogues.cn: 这是国王的旨意 不得质疑
dialogues.en: and you are to do so without quarrel by order of your King.

dialogues.cn: 遵命 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 父亲
dialogues.en: Father.

dialogues.cn: 贝勒里恩是最后一个见证过
dialogues.en: Balerion was the last living creature

dialogues.cn: 末日浩劫之前的瓦雷利亚的生物
dialogues.en: to have seen Old Valyria before the Doom.

dialogues.cn: 见证过它的伟大与阴暗
dialogues.en: Its greatness and its flaws.

dialogues.cn: 当你凝视龙的时候 看到了什么？
dialogues.en: When you look at the dragons, what do you see?

dialogues.cn: 什么？
dialogues.en: What?

dialogues.cn: 自从母亲葬礼后你再没和我说过一句话
dialogues.en: You haven't spoken a word to me since Mother's funeral

dialogues.cn: 而现在你派御林铁卫来……
dialogues.en: and now you send your Kingsguard down...

dialogues.cn: 回答我
dialogues.en: Answer me.

dialogues.cn: 这很重要
dialogues.en: It's important.

dialogues.cn: 你看到了什么？
dialogues.en: What do you see?

dialogues.cn: - 我感觉就像看到了我们自己 - 告诉我
dialogues.en: - I suppose I see us. - Tell me.

dialogues.cn: 每个人都说坦格利安比凡人更接近诸神
dialogues.en: Everyone says Targaryens are closer to gods than to men

dialogues.cn: 但他们那么说是因为我们的龙
dialogues.en: but they say that because of our dragons.

dialogues.cn: 没有龙 我们泯然众人
dialogues.en: Without them, we're just like everyone else.

dialogues.cn: 那种以为我们能控制龙的观念 只是假象
dialogues.en: The idea that we control the dragons is an illusion.

dialogues.cn: 龙的力量不是凡人可以随意玩弄操控的
dialogues.en: They're a power man should never have trifled with.

dialogues.cn: 它带来了瓦雷利亚末日浩劫
dialogues.en: One that brought Valyria its doom.

dialogues.cn: 如果我们不审视自己的历史 它也会给我们带来同样的后果
dialogues.en: If we don't mind our own histories, it will do the same to us.

dialogues.cn: 坦格利安必须明白这一点 才能成为国王……
dialogues.en: Targaryen must understand this to be King...

dialogues.cn: ……或者女王
dialogues.en: or Queen.

dialogues.cn: 我很抱歉 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: I'm sorry, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 自从你出生以来 我浪费了很多时光
dialogues.en: I have wasted the years since you were born

dialogues.cn: 一直苦苦求子
dialogues.en: wanting for a son.

dialogues.cn: 你继承了你母亲最好的一面
dialogues.en: You are the very best of your mother.

dialogues.cn: 我坚信 我知道她也坚信
dialogues.en: And I believe it, I know she did

dialogues.cn: 你会成为一位伟大的女王
dialogues.en: that you could be a great ruling queen.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙是你的继承人
dialogues.en: Daemon is your heir.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙不是国王的料子
dialogues.en: Daemon was not made to wear the crown.

dialogues.cn: 但我相信你是
dialogues.en: But I believe that you were.

dialogues.cn: 瓦列利安家族的科利斯
dialogues.en: Corlys of House Velaryon

dialogues.cn: 潮汐之主 潮头岛伯爵
dialogues.en: Lord of the Tides and Master of Driftmark.

dialogues.cn: 我 科利斯·瓦列利安
dialogues.en: I, Corlys Velaryon

dialogues.cn: 潮汐之主 潮头岛伯爵
dialogues.en: Lord of the Tides and Master of Driftmark

dialogues.cn: 承诺忠于韦赛里斯国王
dialogues.en: promise to be faithful to King Viserys

dialogues.cn: 和他任命的继承人雷妮拉公主
dialogues.en: and his named heir, the Princess Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 我向他们宣誓效忠
dialogues.en: I pledge fealty to them

dialogues.cn: 尽忠护主 竭力御敌
dialogues.en: and shall defend them against all enemies

dialogues.cn: 一片忠心 绝无欺瞒
dialogues.en: in good faith and without deceit.

dialogues.cn: 誓言为证 新旧诸神
dialogues.en: I swear this by the old gods and the new.

dialogues.cn: 这不是小事 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: This is no trivial gesture, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 龙鞍是一码事
dialogues.en: A dragon's saddle is one thing

dialogues.cn: 但铁王座才是全国最危险的位置
dialogues.en: but the Iron Throne is the most dangerous seat in the realm.

dialogues.cn: 我 霍巴特·海塔尔伯爵
dialogues.en: I, Lord Hobert Hightower

dialogues.cn: 南境灯塔 学城守护者
dialogues.en: Beacon of the South, Defender of the Citadel

dialogues.cn: 旧镇之音
dialogues.en: and Voice of Oldtown

dialogues.cn: 承诺忠于韦赛里斯国王
dialogues.en: promise to be faithful to King Viserys

dialogues.cn: 和他任命的继承人雷妮拉公主
dialogues.en: and his named heir, the Princess Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 我向他们宣誓效忠
dialogues.en: I pledge fealty to them

dialogues.cn: 尽忠护主 竭力御敌
dialogues.en: and shall defend them against all enemies

dialogues.cn: 一片忠心 绝无欺言
dialogues.en: in good faith and without deceit.

dialogues.cn: 誓言为证 新旧诸神
dialogues.en: I swear this by the old gods and the new.

dialogues.cn: 伸手
dialogues.en: Give me your hand.

dialogues.cn: 我 博蒙德·拜拉席恩
dialogues.en: I, Boremund Baratheon

dialogues.cn: 承诺忠于韦赛里斯国王
dialogues.en: promise to be faithful to King Viserys.

dialogues.cn: 我还有事得告诉你
dialogues.en: There's something else that I need to tell you.

dialogues.cn: 你理解起来可能有些困难
dialogues.en: It might be difficult for you to understand

dialogues.cn: 但一定要仔细听着
dialogues.en: but you must hear it.

dialogues.cn: 我们的历史
dialogues.en: Our histories

dialogues.cn: 他们说 伊耿从龙石岛眺望黑水湾对岸
dialogues.en: they tell us that Aegon looked across the Blackwater from Dragonstone

dialogues.cn: 看见了一块静待主人的丰饶土地
dialogues.en: saw a rich land ripe for the capture.

dialogues.cn: 但驱使他征服的不只是野心
dialogues.en: But ambition alone is not what drove him to conquest.

dialogues.cn: 那是一个梦
dialogues.en: It was a dream.

dialogues.cn: 正如丹妮思预见到瓦雷里亚的末日
dialogues.en: And just as Daenys foresaw the end of Valyria

dialogues.cn: 伊耿预见了人类世界的末日
dialogues.en: Aegon foresaw the end of the world of men.

dialogues.cn: 它始于遥远的北方袭来的可怕凛冬
dialogues.en: 'Tis to begin with a terrible winter gusting out of the distant north.

dialogues.cn: 我 瑞肯·史塔克 临冬城公爵
dialogues.en: I, Rickon Stark, Lord of Winterfell...

dialogues.cn: 伊耿看到寒风带来的终极黑暗
dialogues.en: Aegon saw absolute darkness riding on those winds.

dialogues.cn: 而栖身其中的东西 会催毁生者的世界
dialogues.en: And whatever dwells within will destroy the world of the living.

dialogues.cn: 当大寒冬来临的时候 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: When this Great Winter comes, Rhaenyra

dialogues.cn: 所有维斯特洛人都该挺身抗击
dialogues.en: all of Westeros must stand against it.

dialogues.cn: 如果人类世界要生存下去
dialogues.en: And if the world of men is to survive

dialogues.cn: 就必须有一位坦格利安坐上铁王座
dialogues.en: a Targaryen must be seated on the Iron Throne.

dialogues.cn: 一位国王或者女王
dialogues.en: A king or queen

dialogues.cn: 强大到足以团结王国对抗寒冷和黑暗
dialogues.en: strong enough to unite the realm against the cold and the dark.

dialogues.cn: 伊耿把这个梦称作“冰与火之歌”
dialogues.en: Aegon called his dream "The Song of Ice and Fire."

dialogues.cn: 这个秘密
dialogues.en: This secret

dialogues.cn: 从伊耿时代起 就在国王和王储间口口相传
dialogues.en: it's been passed from king to heir since Aegon's time.

dialogues.cn: 现在你必须保证会传承秘密
dialogues.en: Now you must promise to carry it

dialogues.cn: 守护秘密
dialogues.en: and protect it.

dialogues.cn: 答应我 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: Promise me this, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 答应我
dialogues.en: Promise me.

dialogues.cn: 我 韦赛里斯·坦格利安一世
dialogues.en: I, Viserys Targaryen, first of his name

dialogues.cn: 安达尔人 洛伊拿人和先民的国王
dialogues.en: King of the Andals, and the Rhoynar, and the First Men

dialogues.cn: 七国统治者暨全境守护者
dialogues.en: Lord of the Seven Kingdoms, and Protector of the Realm

dialogues.cn: 特此任命
dialogues.en: do hereby name

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉·坦格利安
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra Targaryen

dialogues.cn: 为龙石岛公主
dialogues.en: Princess of Dragonstone

dialogues.cn: 暨铁王座继承人
dialogues.en: and heir to the Iron Throne.

dialogues.cn: 你在做什么 叔叔？
dialogues.en: Sparo drīvose gaomā, kepus?

dialogues.cn: 随意坐坐
dialogues.en: Ñuhoso dēman.

dialogues.cn: 说不定哪天这就是我的椅子了
dialogues.en: Kesy ñuhys dēmavos māzīlariot sinilus.

dialogues.cn: 除非你想被处以煽动叛国罪
dialogues.en: Lo hen pāleknot statilūks, daor.

dialogues.cn: 你好久没来宫廷了
dialogues.en: Hen sȳndrāzmā qurdalbri imastō daor.

dialogues.cn: 是的
dialogues.en: Aye.

dialogues.cn: 宫廷里无聊透顶
dialogues.en: Qurdalbar gierī tegenkor issa.

dialogues.cn: 那你为什么还回来？
dialogues.en: Sepār vēzo gō skoro syt āmastā?

dialogues.cn: 我听说你父亲要以我的名义举办一场比武大会
dialogues.en: Kepa aōha yno syt kōttion pradilas, ryptan.

dialogues.cn: 那是为他的继承人举办的比武大会
dialogues.en: Kōttion dāranno syt issa.

dialogues.cn: 这不就是我的意思嘛
dialogues.en: Heksīr ȳdratan.

dialogues.cn: 他的新继承人
dialogues.en: Dāranno zȳho arlio syt.

dialogues.cn: 除非你母亲生下一个儿子
dialogues.en: Iā aōha muña trēsi sikos,

dialogues.cn: 你们被我缠定了
dialogues.en: iā jevo yrgoti zbērion.

dialogues.cn: 那我倒是希望能有个弟弟
dialogues.en: Sepār valonqri jaelinna.

dialogues.cn: 真美
dialogues.en: Gevie.

dialogues.cn: 我在想 我弟弟活着的那几个小时里
dialogues.en: Ñurho valonqro paghyro jēdunna,

dialogues.cn: 父亲是否终于体会到了幸福
dialogues.en: lo tolijī kepa ñuha kirimvī rhēdos pendan...?

dialogues.cn: 你父亲需要你
dialogues.en: Kepa aōha avy sīr

dialogues.cn: 比以往任何时候更甚
dialogues.en: ojūdo tubiro toliot jorrāelza.

dialogues.cn: 但我永远都无法成为他的儿子
dialogues.en: Trēsy dōrī kesan.

dialogues.cn: 这是韦赛里斯一世在位的第九年
此时离疯王伊里斯过世
离
及其女儿丹妮莉丝·坦格利安公主出生 还有172年
